title: Screen Specification Schema
description: Shared schema for screen specifications used by /mockups and /catalog-screens. Defines core element fields, discoverable convention fields, screen-level metadata, library detection categories, and framework-specific discovery patterns. Directory structure: Mockups/{Mockup-Name}/ containing README.md, Specs/, Screens/, and AsciiScreens/ subdirectories.

routeUrl.description: Route path or URL pattern (if applicable)

libraries.description: Detected JS/CSS libraries affecting this screen, grouped by category

component.description: Component libraries (MUI, Ant Design, Shadcn/ui, Radix UI, Headless UI, Chakra UI, Mantine). Discovery: package.json dependencies + import statements.

css.description: CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, CSS Modules, styled-components, Emotion, Sass/SCSS). Discovery: package.json + tailwind.config.*, postcss.config.*, file extensions (.module.css, .styled.ts).

form.description: Form libraries (Formik, React Hook Form, VeeValidate, Zod, Yup). Discovery: package.json + import statements.

animation.description: Animation libraries (Framer Motion, React Spring, GSAP). Discovery: import statements (affects element state/transitions).

icon.description: Icon libraries (Lucide, Heroicons, FontAwesome, Material Icons). Discovery: import statements (affects button/link element content).

directoryStructure.description: Mockup directory structure conventions: Mockups/{Mockup-Name}/ containing README.md, Specs/ (screen specs), Screens/ (interactive UI mockups), AsciiScreens/ (text/ASCII mockups)

root.description: Root directory for all mockup sets

subdirectories.description: Standard subdirectories within each mockup set

indexFile.description: Auto-generated index file in each mockup set

element.description: A single interactive UI element on a screen

elementId.description: Unique identifier for the element within the screen

validInput.description: Description of valid input values or formats

validationMessage.description: Error message shown on invalid input

dependencies.description: Other elements this element depends on (e.g., 'country=US' for conditional visibility)

notes.description: Additional behavioral constraints, conditional rendering, etc.

dataTestId.description: Test selector for automated testing (Playwright, Cypress, Testing Library). Discovery: data-testid attribute in source.

ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label when visual label differs or is absent. Discovery: aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute.

ariaRole.description: ARIA role (e.g., dialog, alert, navigation, tabpanel). Discovery: role attribute.

cssSelector.description: Primary CSS selector path for the element. Discovery: className, id, or CSS modules.

formGroup.description: Logical grouping the element belongs to. Discovery: fieldset, form section, or grouping component.

placeholder.description: Placeholder/hint text shown in empty inputs. Discovery: placeholder attribute.

autocomplete.description: Browser autocomplete hint (e.g., email, current-password, street-address). Discovery: autocomplete attribute.

tabIndex.description: Keyboard navigation order (null = natural DOM order). Discovery: tabIndex or DOM order.

eventHandlers.description: List of event handler names attached to the element. Discovery: onClick, onChange, onSubmit, etc.

stateBinding.description: State management binding (framework-specific). Discovery: v-model, useState, formik.values, etc.

conditionalRender.description: Conditions under which element is rendered. Discovery: v-if, ternary JSX, {condition && ...}.

componentRef.description: Source component that renders this element (for tracing delegation chains). Discovery: import path or component name.

libraryComponent.description: Library component wrapping or implementing this element (e.g., MUI/TextField, antd/Select). Null for native HTML elements.

frameworkDiscoveryPatterns.description: Framework-specific conventions that discovery should look for when scanning source code

default: IPC channel names bound to form elements
